nav.welcome_subtitle: The official Action Figure, Funko Pop, and Comic Book marketplace.
nav.official_store_subtitle: Get certified action figures and special editions with guaranteed shipping.
nav.favorites_desc: Your saved items and listings of interest.
nav.no_favorites: You have no saved favorites yet.
nav.explore_catalog_desc: Explore the database of collectibles for sale.
nav.no_following: You are not following any sellers yet.

search.try_modifying: Try modifying your search filters or the text you entered.

marketplace.login_to_follow: Log in to add this seller to your favorites.
marketplace.login_to_cart: Please log in to add items to cart.
marketplace.login_to_favorite: Please log in to save products to your favorites.
marketplace.no_stock: Sorry, there is not enough stock available for this figure ({{count}} units).
marketplace.no_following: You are not following any sellers yet.
marketplace.email_notification_msg: New figure from {{store}} on Geek Collector PR! Hello {{name}}, your favorite seller {{store}} just published "{{title}}" for ${{price}}. Come check it out!
marketplace.sms_notification_msg: Geek Collector PR ALERT: {{store}} published "{{title}}" for ${{price}}! View at: #product/{{id}}
marketplace.notifications_sent_msg: {{count}} email/SMS alert(s) sent to followers of {{store}} for their new item: "{{title}}".
marketplace.followed_seller: You are now following {{name}}! You will receive notifications when they post new items.

product.warranty_text: Only verified buyers who have physically received the figure can leave reviews here. This ensures feedback free of bots and scalpers.
product.write_review_desc: Tell the community about the condition, packaging, and shipping speed of this figure.
product.review_comment_placeholder: Write your detailed review about the packaging, condition of the figure, etc...
product.no_reviews: No buyer reviews for this figure yet.
product.must_buy_to_review: You must purchase this product first to leave a review.
product.file_too_large: The file is too large. The upload limit is 5MB.
product.select_rating: Please select a rating from 1 to 5 stars.
product.login_to_buy: Please log in or create an account to buy this item.
product.login_to_favorite: Please log in to save products to your favorites.

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.item_out_of_stock: Sorry, this item is out of stock.
cart.item_stock_limit: You cannot add more items. Stock available: {{stock}}

checkout.title: Secure Checkout Gateway
checkout.subtitle: Complete your order using Stripe & Shippo Integrations
checkout.insurance_desc: This package includes special or high-value items (> $100). The insurance cost will be added automatically to the selected carrier to cover potential damage or loss in transit.
checkout.fragile_desc: A physical protection surcharge has been added and priority transport options are advised.
checkout.shippo_quote_error: Error quoting shipping with Shippo. Using local simulation.
checkout.select_address_rate: Please select or add a shipping address to quote rates.
checkout.stripe_uninitialized: The Stripe payment processor has not been initialized.
checkout.payout_to_platform: Net commission to Geek Collector PR
checkout.empty_cart_error: You have no items to buy at this time.
checkout.login_to_checkout: Log in to proceed to checkout.
checkout.select_shipping_method: Please select a shipping method before paying.
checkout.subtitle_desc: Complete your order using Stripe & Shippo Integrations
checkout.insurance_recommended_text: This package includes special or high-value items (> $100). The cost of insurance will be automatically added to the selected carrier to cover potential damage or mail loss.
checkout.fragile_item_text: A physical protection surcharge has been added and selecting priority transit options is advised.
checkout.express_not_real: This is an express Stripe simulation button and does not process real transactions.
checkout.express_add_address_first: Please add or select a shipping address before using express checkout.
checkout.select_address_toast: Please select or add a shipping address to quote rates.
checkout.shipping_config_error: Error quoting shipping with Shippo. Using local simulation.
checkout.complete_card_info: Please complete the credit card information.
checkout.stripe_not_initialized: The Stripe payment processor has not been initialized.
checkout.stripe_not_configured: Stripe is not configured on the server.
checkout.no_client_secret: The payment confirmation token (clientSecret) was not received from the server.
checkout.payment_failed: The payment could not be completed successfully.
checkout.fragile_warning: Warning: The item is fragile. It is recommended to select express shipping with active insurance.

seller.stripe_disconnected_desc: To receive real bank transfers for your sales, you need to configure your payout details with Stripe.
seller.structure_desc: Your current commission is {{rate}}%. Listing is free. Upon completing a sale, Geek Collector PR's commission and Stripe's actual processing fee will be deducted.
seller.structure_btn: View fees & how my earnings are calculated
seller.no_products: You have no figures listed in the catalog yet.
seller.no_shipments: No shipping orders recorded for your sales yet.
seller.label_download_desc: Download your shipping label in PDF format or preview it below:
seller.no_orders: You have not received any orders yet.
seller.frm_desc_placeholder: Detail the physical condition of the box, if it includes accessories, origin, etc...
seller.frm_image_placeholder: Paste image URL or leave blank to use generic.
seller.publish_success: Item successfully submitted! It will be reviewed by the administrator.
seller.refund_success: Refund processed successfully. ${{amount}} returned to buyer. Order is now marked as refunded.
seller.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this product from the catalog?
seller.confirm_refund: Are you sure you want to refund this order? Money will be transferred back to the buyer.
seller.agreement_alert_desc: You must read and accept Geek Collector PR's commissions, refund, dispute, and shipping policies before listing or selling items.
seller.guidelines_accepted_success: You have successfully accepted the seller guidelines!
seller.payout_total: Estimated Net Earning (Received in your bank):
seller.fragile_item_title: This item is fragile or delicate
seller.paste_media_url: Paste image or video URL here...
seller.fill_main_fields_error: Please fill in the main fields: title, brand, price, and description.
seller.media_limit_partial: Only {{count}} files added. 5 media limit reached.
seller.media_max_reached_toast: Maximum limit of 5 media files reached.
seller.fees_guidelines_desc: Review marketplace terms, guidelines and your acceptance history.
seller.must_agree_guidelines_toast: You must check the box to confirm you agree with the seller guidelines.
seller.login_to_publish_error: Log in to be able to publish items.
seller.no_active_profile_error: You do not have an active seller profile at this time.
seller.suspended_publishing_error: Your ability to publish items is currently suspended by the administrator.
seller.before_publishing_first_desc: To guarantee the safety and transparency of the marketplace, you must read and accept Geek Collector's commission guidelines, shipping and dispute policies.
seller.no_figures_published: You have no figures published in the catalog yet.
seller.reliability_desc: Monitor your account's trust score, late cancellations, and suspensions.
seller.no_shipments_registered: No shipments registered for your sales yet.
seller.no_orders_received: You have not received any purchase orders yet.
seller.no_reviews_received: You have not received any ratings yet.
seller.shipper_rule_evidence: You must upload packing evidence photo before delivering package to carrier.
seller.marked_dropped_off: Package successfully delivered to the carrier.
seller.delivered_escrow_released: Package delivered! Funds released to seller balance.
seller.strikes_blocked: Your account has 2 or more active strikes. Listing new items is blocked.
seller.advanced_shipping_desc: Enter package weight and dimensions for Shippo API quote simulation.
seller.fragile_recommends: This collectible is fragile (Recommends bubbles in evidence)
seller.desc_placeholder: Describe physical condition, box details, etc...
seller.no_media_added: No files added yet. Upload files or paste URLs.
seller.profile_pending_approval_desc: Your seller store has been created and is being reviewed by a Geek Collector PR Administrator. You will receive an email notification once your account is approved to publish figures.
seller.view_full_guidelines: View full guideline in a new window
seller.commission_structure_desc: Your current commission is {{rate}}%. Listing is free. Upon completing a sale, Geek Collector PR's commission and Stripe's actual processing fee will be deducted.
seller.view_fees_guidelines_btn: View commissions and how my earnings are calculated
seller.stripe_conn_error: Error initiating Stripe connection. Please try again.
seller.view_earnings_calc: View how my earnings were calculated
seller.net_formula_text: Net Profit = Item Subtotal - Platform Commission - Stripe Commission - Seller Shipping - Seller Refunds
seller.commission_card_desc: “Listing items on Geek Collector is free. When you complete a sale, Geek Collector deducts a commission of {{pct}}% on the subtotal of items sold. The actual payment processing fee charged by Stripe is also deducted.”
seller.commission_card_note: “The buyer does not pay the Geek Collector commission. The buyer only pays the price of the items, shipping, and applicable taxes.”

admin.shipping_subtitle: Monitor the status of all marketplace labels, validate packaging evidence, and manage Connect payout disputes.
admin.no_shipments: No shipments registered in the system.
admin.compliance_subtitle: Monitor platform health, apply automatic refunds, and handle bans for problematic sellers.
admin.all_sellers_optimal: All sellers are in optimal standing.
admin.notifications_subtitle: History of automatic Email and SMS notifications sent to followers of favorite sellers.
admin.confirm_remove_strike: Are you sure you want to remove 1 strike from this seller?
admin.confirm_force_ban: Are you sure you want to PERMANENTLY BAN this seller? Their products will no longer be visible.
admin.confirm_delete_product: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this product from the marketplace?
admin.dashboard_desc: Global control of marketplace, commissions, approvals and catalog.
admin.no_moderation: No products pending moderation at this time.
admin.commissions_subtitle: Define commission percentages and processing costs for the business.
admin.frm_general_commission_desc: Flat fee charged to the seller on each transaction. Default: 5%
admin.frm_min_fee_desc: Minimum flat fee if percentage commission is lower. Use 0 to disable.
admin.frm_buyer_protection: Activate Buyer Protection Fee (Inactive - Removed by Administrator)
admin.frm_additional_protection: Activate additional protection charge (Inactive - Removed by Administrator)
admin.guidelines_subtitle: Manage Geek Collector PR's commissions, shipping, refund, and dispute policies.
admin.locked_title: Locked: This version already has acceptance signatures.
admin.search_seller_placeholder: Search seller by name or ID...
admin.no_signatures: No signatures recorded with selected filters.
admin.users_stores_subtitle: Manage system users, roles, suspensions, and commissions.
admin.no_users: No users registered in the system.
admin.audit_min_fee_changed: Minimum fee per sale changed from ${{prev}} to ${{curr}}
admin.policy_notification_msg: Geek Collector will update its seller commission to {{rate}}% starting today. You must accept the new terms.
admin.frm_ver_material_label: Is this change of a Material nature? (Forces all sellers to re-sign):
admin.frm_ver_material_yes: Yes, requires re-signature from all sellers
admin.frm_ver_material_no: No, it is a purely informative change
admin.dispute_opened_toast: 🚨 A Dispute has been registered for this shipment. The corresponding Payout will be locked in Stripe Connect.
admin.dispute_resolved_toast: 🔓 Dispute resolved. Funds hold has been released. The seller will receive their payout.
admin.returned_shipping_toast: 🔄 Package return to seller registered. The order will be considered refunded.
admin.seller_approved_toast: Seller account successfully approved and Stripe Connect account linked!
admin.seller_rejected_toast: Seller request rejected and profile deleted.
admin.product_approved_toast: Product approved and published in the store!
admin.publishing_suspended_msg: The Administrator has temporarily suspended your ability to list new products.
admin.publishing_reactivated_msg: The Administrator has reinstated your ability to list items. Make sure to adhere to all guidelines.
admin.signatures_csv_exported: Acceptance history exported in CSV format.
admin.policy_notification_msg_ver: We updated the Seller Guidelines ({{version}}). You must review and accept the new version before listing additional items.
admin.guidelines_locked_edit_error: This version has acceptances and cannot be edited.
admin.catalog_changes_applied: Changes successfully applied to the catalog!
admin.prompt_new_commission_rate: Enter the new commission rate for this store (e.g. 0.05 for 5%):
admin.commission_rate_invalid: Invalid commission rate. Must be a number between 0 and 1.
admin.fill_all_fields: Please complete all fields to create the policy.
admin.version_id_exists: The version identifier "{{version}}" already exists. Choose a different one.

auth.login_desc: Enter your registered credentials in the Geek Collector PR database.
auth.register_title: Sign Up at Geek Collector PR
auth.register_desc: Create your Buyer or Seller account at Geek Collector PR.
auth.action_question: What do you want to do?
auth.store_desc_placeholder: What kind of collectibles do you sell?
auth.profile_not_synced: User profile not synced yet. Refresh the page.
auth.incorrect_credentials: Incorrect credentials. Please verify your data.
auth.accept_fees_required: You must accept the commissions structure and payment policies to register as a seller.
auth.seller_pending_toast: Seller registration successful! Your profile is pending Administrator approval.
auth.account_created_welcome: Account successfully created! Welcome to Geek Collector PR, {{name}}.

validation.main_fields_required: Please fill in all main fields (Name, Email, and Password).
validation.accept_rules_required: You must accept the commissions structure and payment policies to register as a seller.
validation.fill_email_password: Please fill in email and password.
validation.password_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.price_greater_zero: Price must be greater than zero.
validation.stock_greater_zero: Stock must be at least 1 unit.
validation.stripe_onboarding_missing: You must link your Stripe account in the seller panel before selling.
validation.commission_percentage_range: Please enter a valid commission percentage (0% - 100%).
validation.fill_all_fields: Please fill in all form fields.
validation.admin_access_required: Administrator privileges are required to access this section.
validation.seller_access_required: An active Seller account is required to access this section.

api_errors.UNAUTHORIZED: You must log in to perform this action.
api_errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have an active seller profile.
api_errors.INVALID_VERSION: The policy version you are trying to accept is not the current policy version on the server.
api_errors.SELLER_SUSPENDED: Your account or publishing privileges are suspended by the administrator.
api_errors.SELLER_GUIDELINES_ACCEPTANCE_REQUIRED: You must accept the current Seller Guidelines before listing items.

sellerGuidelines.requiredMessage: You must read and accept the Seller Guidelines before listing an item.
sellerGuidelines.checkbox: I confirm that I have read and agree to the terms of the Seller Guidelines.
